Enum Class TeamRole

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<TeamRole>
com.skyblockexp.teamsapi.model.TeamRole
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<TeamRole>, Constable
public enum TeamRole extends Enum<TeamRole>
Represents the role of a member within a Team.

Roles are ordered by priority; a higher priority value means a higher rank. Use outranks(TeamRole) or canManage(TeamRole) for role comparisons rather than relying on ordinal or name ordering.

Team plugin implementations may store role information as the enum constant name. Adding new constants to this enum in future API versions will be done only at lower priorities so existing role checks remain unchanged.

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    ADMIN
    A team administrator.
    MEMBER
    A regular team member with no elevated permissions within the team.
    OWNER
    The owner of the team.

  • Enum Constant Details

    • OWNER

      public static final TeamRole OWNER
      The owner of the team. There is exactly one owner at any time. Owners have full authority over the team and all its members.

    • ADMIN

      public static final TeamRole ADMIN
      A team administrator. Admins can manage regular members but cannot manage other admins or the owner. Specific capabilities depend on the provider implementation.

    • MEMBER

      public static final TeamRole MEMBER
      A regular team member with no elevated permissions within the team.

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static TeamRole[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static TeamRole valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • getPriority

      public int getPriority()
      Returns the numeric priority of this role. Higher values indicate higher authority within a team.
      Returns:
      the priority value

    • outranks

      public boolean outranks(TeamRole other)
      Returns true if this role has a higher priority than other.
      Parameters:
      other - the role to compare against
      Returns:
      true if this role outranks other
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if other is null

    • canManage

      public boolean canManage(TeamRole target)
      Returns true if this role is permitted to manage (promote, demote, kick) a member of the given role. A role can only manage roles with a strictly lower priority.
      Parameters:
      target - the role of the target member
      Returns:
      true if this role can manage the target role
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if target is null
